case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. KAR TUNG SEE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT SEE, KAR TUNG JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
